LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BICH-KHOI DO AND MARIA VELASQUEZ'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO REMOVE OR REDUCE MECHANIC'S LIEN IS GRANTED; DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATING THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM LACKS PROBABLE VALIDITY. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE CONTRADICTING DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
